data.raceComments: {"comment":"4. TWO FACED is in good form at present. Finished third at his latest appearance over 1609m at this track, beaten 8 metres. Steps up a level but he is good enough to take this out. 1. MR PROFETA drew a wide gate last start and was never a genuine threat, beaten 24 metres into fifth at this track over 1609m. Starts from a far better position this time and is good enough to put himself right in the finish. 3. LAST GOODBYE is worth thought after finishing sixth first-up over 1609m at Pocono Downs last time out. 7. HUGH HESTON disappointed last time when sixth over 1609m at this track. Can do a lot better so worth considering.","runners":[4,1,3,7],"exclusive":false}
